CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(BEGINS(Asset.Product2.CodeNatureAppareil__r.Name,'A-1'), BEGINS(Asset.Product2.CodeNatureAppareil__r.Name,'A-2'), BEGINS(Asset.Product2.CodeNatureAppareil__r.Name,'B-1'), BEGINS(Asset.Product2.CodeNatureAppareil__r.Name,'B-2'), BEGINS(Asset.Product2.CodeNatureAppareil__r.Name,'D-1'), BEGINS(Asset.Product2.CodeNatureAppareil__r.Name,'D-2'), BEGINS(Asset.Product2.CodeNatureAppareil__r.Name,'F-1'), BEGINS(Asset.Product2.CodeNatureAppareil__r.Name,'F-2'), BEGINS(Asset.Product2.CodeNatureAppareil__r.Name,'F-3'), BEGINS(Asset.Product2.CodeNatureAppareil__r.Name,'G-1'), BEGINS(Asset.Product2.CodeNatureAppareil__r.Name,'G-2'), BEGINS(Asset.Product2.CodeNatureAppareil__r.Name,'G-3')),
IF (Asset.Product2.DerniereAnneeAvecFCR__c>=Asset.Product2.DerniereAnneeSansFCR__c, IF (!OR(Asset.Product2.DerniereAnneeAvecFCR__c=0, Asset.Product2.DerniereAnneeSansFCR__c=0), IF (IF(YEAR(Asset.InstallDate) >= MAX(Asset.Product2.DerniereAnneeAvecFCR__c,Asset.Product2.DerniereAnneeSansFCR__c), 1, IF(YEAR(Asset.InstallDate) < MIN(Asset.Product2.DerniereAnneeAvecFCR__c,Asset.Product2.DerniereAnneeSansFCR__c), -1, 0))!=0, "oui", "non"), "oui"), IF (IF(YEAR(Asset.InstallDate) >= MAX(Asset.Product2.DerniereAnneeAvecFCR__c,Asset.Product2.DerniereAnneeSansFCR__c), 1, IF(YEAR(Asset.InstallDate) < MIN(Asset.Product2.DerniereAnneeAvecFCR__c,Asset.Product2.DerniereAnneeSansFCR__c), -1, 0))>0, "non", "oui") ),
"N/A")
CustomField.label: Présence de FCR
